# LanternELL Design System

**Generated by UI UX Pro Max**  
**Date**: 2026-03-06  
**Platform**: K-2 ELL/Newcomer Teacher Printable Resources

---

## Pattern

- **Name:** App Store Style Landing
- **Conversion Focus:** Show real screenshots. Include ratings (4.5+ stars). QR code for mobile. Platform-specific CTAs.
- **CTA Placement:** Download buttons prominent throughout
- **Color Strategy:** Playful indigo + energetic orange
- **Sections:** 
  1. Hero with device mockup
  2. Screenshots carousel
  3. Features with icons
  4. Reviews/ratings
  5. Download CTAs

---

## Style

- **Name:** Claymorphism
- **Keywords:** Soft 3D, chunky, playful, toy-like, bubbly, thick borders (3-4px), double shadows, rounded (16-24px)
- **Best For:** Educational apps, children's apps, SaaS platforms, creative tools, fun-focused, onboarding
- **Performance:** Good
- **Accessibility:** Ensure 4.5:1 contrast ratio

---

## Colors

| Role | Hex | Usage |
|------|-----|-------|
| Primary | #4F46E5 | Main brand color, buttons, links |
| Secondary | #818CF8 | Accents, secondary buttons |
| CTA | #F97316 | Primary call-to-action buttons |
| Background | #EEF2FF | Page background |
| Text | #1E1B4B | Primary text |
| Surface | #FFFFFF | Card backgrounds |
| Muted | #6366F1 | Secondary text |

---

## Typography

- **Heading:** Crimson Pro (academic, trustworthy)
- **Body:** Atkinson Hyperlegible (accessible, readable)
- **Google Fonts Import:**
```css
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Atkinson+Hyperlegible:wght@400;700&family=Crimson+Pro:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap');
```

---

## Key Effects

- Inner+outer shadows (subtle, no hard lines)
- Soft press (200ms ease-out)
- Fluffy, bubbly elements
- Smooth transitions (150-300ms)
- Border radius: 16-24px for cards, 8-12px for buttons

---

## Claymorphism CSS Reference

```css
.clay-card {
  background: #FFFFFF;
  border-radius: 20px;
  border: 3px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);
  box-shadow: 
    8px 8px 16px rgba(163, 177, 198, 0.6),
    -8px -8px 16px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);
}

.clay-button {
  background: linear-gradient(145deg, #5a5eee, #4545d4);
  border-radius: 12px;
  border: 2px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
  box-shadow: 
    4px 4px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15),
    -2px -2px 6px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
  transition: all 200ms ease-out;
}

.clay-button:hover {
  transform: translateY(-2px);
  box-shadow: 
    6px 6px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2),
    -3px -3px 8px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25);
}

.clay-button:active {
  transform: translateY(0);
  box-shadow: inset 4px 4px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
}
```

---

## Components

### Hero Section
- Headline with Crimson Pro
- Subheadline
- CTA buttons (Primary: Orange, Secondary: Indigo)
- Hero image or illustration

### Course Catalog Cards (Claymorphism)
- Border: 3px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6)
- Border radius: 20px
- Double shadow for 3D effect
- Icon, title, description, price badge

### Progress Tracking Demo
- Circular progress indicators
- Stat cards with claymorphism
- Animated elements

### Testimonials
- Quote cards with avatar
- Star ratings (gold)
- Teacher name and role

### Enrollment CTA
- Prominent orange CTA button
- Trust badges
- FAQ accordion

---

## Responsive Breakpoints

- Mobile: 375px
- Tablet: 768px
- Desktop: 1024px
- Wide: 1440px

---

## Anti-Patterns to Avoid

- Dark modes (keep light theme)
- Complex jargon
- Emojis as icons (use SVG: Heroicons/Lucide)
- Hard shadows or harsh lines

---

## Pre-Delivery Checklist

- [ ] No emojis as icons (use SVG: Heroicons/Lucide)
- [ ] cursor-pointer on all clickable elements
- [ ] Hover states with smooth transitions (150-300ms)
- [ ] Light mode: text contrast 4.5:1 minimum
- [ ] Focus states visible for keyboard nav
- [ ] prefers-reduced-motion respected
- [ ] Responsive: 375px, 768px, 1024px, 1440px
